text:
Market today: A cautious mood prevails as Schwab strategists warn the era of easy index gains is over. This suggests a tougher road ahead for broad market and tech index funds, which heavily influence your book.

Your holdings: Your leveraged SPAL, a new and fast-moving ETF, is already below its stop at 21.38, currently at 19.6, needing immediate attention. SOXL is also very close to its 200 stop at 202.6. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Closely monitor SOXL's 200 stop and decide on SPAL. Also, keep an eye on broader market sentiment given the shift away from easy index gains.

Bottom line: Focus on tight risk management and defending your stops, especially on leveraged positions, in this potentially shifting market.
plays: Consider trimming SPAL, currently at 19.6, as this fast-moving, leveraged ETF is below its 21.38 stop. Drops are amplified on margin.
Watch SOXL closely around its 200 stop. A break could signal further downside in this leveraged chip bull ETF.
Consider ZS for a new long entry between 142.14-140.58 with a stop at 138.32. It's a high-score setup in a daily discount.
